Retrieved Ott line, but probe was no longer attached to 25lb plate weight (must have been stolen as conduit was not damaged in any way). Unwrapped probe and cleaned membrane, re-wrapped in cloth. Reaffixed Ott to new rail tie orifice block with hose clamps and placed behind large boulder. First DWL not representative of SRC (-0.095m) wrong location. Conducted second SRC @ found location of Ott (-0.087m - to be applied). Conducted 3rd DWL in area behind boulder where Ott was placed afterwards (within 0.002m of 1st DWL).
